title: Marketplace Manager - Urban Ladder Advisory Limited - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Urban Ladder Advisory Limited - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Ladder Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Urban Ladder Advisory Limited:
Urban Ladder Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
